---
title: Test
lang: fr
format: markdown
_quarto:
  tests:
    markdown:
      ensureFileRegexMatches:
        -
          - "^lang: fr$"
        -
          - "crossref-ch-prefix"
          - "crossref-lof-title"
          - "crossref-lot-title"
          - "crossref-fig-title"
          - "toc-title-document"
---

# Section

A paragraph in French (`lang: fr`).
